summary: Iteration 94: Backend APIs all working (13/13 tests passed). Cinema /films route order fix verified. Events Management page loads with Dashboard/Management/Communications tabs. LaundryManagement page shows blank screen due to React component error - needs investigation.

ui_bugs.issue: Page shows blank screen - React error: 'An error occurred in the <LaundryManagement> component'

issues: Duplicate isFav/toggleFav props in JSX (LaundryResults, PackagesResults, EventsResults, CinemaResults, BanquetResults) - causes Vite warnings but not functional issue

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix LaundryManagement blank screen - React component error needs debugging
MINOR: Remove duplicate isFav/toggleFav props from result page components
critical_code_review_comments: Cinema /films route correctly placed before /{cinema_id} route (line 69 vs 100) - verified working
EventsManagement has cover_image field with file upload (lines 287-311) - code present
All result pages (Events, Cinema, Laundry, Packages, Banquet) have SubscribeButton component
No MOCK_ constants found in result pages - all fetch from backend API
useRealDashboardData hook has proper default values for stats
LaundryManagement component structure looks correct but throws runtime error

success_rate.frontend: Partial - Events Management loads, LaundryManagement shows blank screen

context_for_next_testing_agent: LaundryManagement page at /management/pressing shows blank screen with React error. Events Management at /management/events loads correctly with tabs. Backend APIs all working. The error appears to be in the LaundryManagement component itself - possibly related to useRealDashboardData hook or ServiceExecutiveDashboard component interaction. Console shows chart dimension warnings but those are not the root cause.

backend_api_verification.GET /api/pressing/: ✓ Returns pressings list with total count
backend_api_verification.GET /api/events/: ✓ Returns events list with total count
backend_api_verification.GET /api/cinema/films: ✓ Returns films list (route order fix verified)
backend_api_verification.GET /api/management/dashboard-stats: ✓ Returns real dashboard data with auth

code_verification.subscribe_button_in_results: ✓ All result pages have SubscribeButton component
code_verification.no_mock_data_fallbacks: ✓ Result pages fetch from API, no MOCK_ constants
